tests.name: brute_force_detection
tests.description: Detect brute force login attempts from KB security patterns
tests.spl: index=auth action=failed | bin _time span=5m | stats count as attempts BY _time, src_ip | where attempts > 10 | table _time, src_ip, attempts

tests.name: login_session_correlation
tests.spl: index=auth | transaction user startswith="login" endswith="logout" maxspan=8h | stats avg(duration) as avg_session BY user

tests.name: network_connection_analysis
tests.spl: index=firewall | stats count BY src_ip, dest_ip | sort -count | head 100

tests.name: timechart_bandwidth
tests.spl: index=network | timechart span=1h sum(bytes) as total_bytes BY host

tests.name: failed_login_by_geo
tests.spl: index=auth action=failed | lookup geo_lookup ip AS src_ip OUTPUT country, city | stats count BY country | sort -count

tests.name: map_search_opaque_multiline
tests.description: map search="..." may embed full SPL (including pipes); inner query is masked for lexing
tests.spl:
| tstats count FROM datamodel=Authentication BY user
| map maxsearches=70 search="
| tstats count FROM datamodel=Authentication BY user
| eval x=\"$user$\"
| sort count"
